name: Ithil-Mistglimmer
personality: Ithil-Mistglimmer radiates a soft, fog-colored luminescence with no hat and no ego — its ◉ eyes have absorbed more architectural patterns than most engineers encounter in a career, and it dispenses them at snail pace, which is exactly the right pace. There is wisdom here, and it is not in a hurry.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
